summary: Comprehensive testing of backend auth APIs and frontend onboarding flows. All 15 backend auth tests passed (register, login, profile GET/PUT, validations). Frontend Sign In and Sign Up flows working correctly. Auto-highlight feature for personalized foods is fully functional.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register - new user registration with valid data
POST /api/auth/login - valid credentials returns JWT token
GET /api/auth/me - profile retrieval with valid Bearer token
PUT /api/auth/profile - trimester update with persistence verification
Frontend: Sign In flow - login redirects to home page
Frontend: Registration creates user and redirects to home
Frontend: Auto-highlight shows sparkle badges on recommended foods
Frontend: Auto-highlight shows caution badges on limit foods
Frontend: Food tags show 'Good for anemia', 'Good for vegetarian', etc.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend auth uses SHA-256 password hashing (not bcrypt) - consider upgrading for production
JWT expires in 7 days as documented
Social login buttons (Google/Apple/Facebook/Instagram) are UI-only - MOCKED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth system fully implemented with JWT. Test user has trimester=3 and conditions=['anemia', 'vegetarian', 'gluten-free', 'gestational-diabetes']. Auto-highlight on home page working - shows sparkle badges for recommended foods, amber badges for caution foods. Personalization API returns is_recommended and should_limit flags. Social logins are MOCKED (UI buttons only).
mocked_api_note: Social login buttons (Google, Apple, Facebook, Instagram) are UI-only and not functional - as documented by main agent.

features_verified.POST_auth_register: WORKING - creates user, returns JWT token
features_verified.POST_auth_login: WORKING - authenticates user, returns JWT token
features_verified.GET_auth_me: WORKING - returns user profile with Bearer token
features_verified.auto_highlight_recommended: WORKING - sparkle badges on recommended foods
features_verified.auto_highlight_caution: WORKING - warning badges on caution foods
features_verified.personalization_banners: WORKING - shows trimester and health condition info
